Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Disqualifying Jonathan Fried From Representing Place Of Frank'S Llc In Any Capacity And Establishing That Frank Meyers Is The Sole Managing Member Of Same
Off Calendar Jul-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Lillian K. Sing; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Ian A. Hansen, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group (415-318-5709), counsel for plaintiffs/moving parties
Robert Sprague, Esq. (415-932-8977), counsel for defendants/opposing parties
Sean Shaughnessy, Esq. of the Law Office of Daniel Berko (415-771-6174), counsel for cross-defendant, Patel

Court hears arguments from all. Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF FRANK MYERS' Motion For Order Disqualifying Jonathan Fried From Representing Place Of Frank's LLC In Any Capacity And Establishing That Frank Meyers Is The Sole Managing Member Of Same is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. No opposition filed. Jonathan Fried is disqualified from representation of Place of Frank's LLC in this action. Request to disqualify Jonathan Fried fromm serving as a manager/exclusive manager and declaring Frank Myers the sole and exclusive manager is DENIED. No authority is cited in support of this request. Request to replace Jonathan Fried by Robert Sprague is DENIED. Robert Sprague is the attorney of record for the only other member of the Place of Frank's LLC. Place of Frank's LLC shall have 30 days to hire independent counsel either by mutual agreement of Fried and Myers; or, if agreement is not reached by August 8, 2014, Fried and Myers may submit via declaration no later than August 12, 2014 the names of one counsel each who agree to represent Place of Frank's LLC. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Disqualifying Jonathan Fried From Representing Place Of Frank'S Llc In Any Capacity And Establishing That Frank Meyers Is The Sole Managing Member Of Same
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Continued To Jul-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Sprague, Esq. of Law Offices of Robert Sprague, (415-932-8977), for Frank Myers, Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF FRANK MYERS' Motion For Order Disqualifying Jonathan Fried From Representing Place Of Frank's LLC In Any Capacity And Establishing That Frank Meyers Is The Sole Managing Member Of Same is continued to July 11, 2014 per the order of the presiding judge. CCP 170.6 on file. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
